testcase.name: test_multichip_decode_geometry_candidate[blackhole-blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message: RuntimeError: TT_THROW @ /home/mvasiljevic/tt-metal/tt_metal/impl/program/program.cpp:1492: tt::exception info: Statically allocated circular buffers on core range [0-0 - 7-9] grow to testcase.failure:
mesh_device = MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices) record_property = <function record_property.<locals>.append_property at 0x7c4f69c75440>
@_mesh_test def test_multichip_decode_geometry_candidate(mesh_device, record_property): """One-real-weight-variable-at-a-time DRAM-sharded geometry sweep."""
candidate_id = os.environ.get("MULTICHIP_GEOMETRY_CANDIDATE") if candidate_id not in GEOMETRY_CANDIDATES: pytest.skip(f"set MULTICHIP_GEOMETRY_CANDIDATE to one of {sorted(GEOMETRY_CANDIDATES)}") > _run_decode_policy_candidate( mesh_device, record_property, candidate_id=candidate_id, changes=GEOMETRY_CANDIDATES[candidate_id], )
models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:883: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tests/test_multichip_decoder.py:812: in _run_decode_policy_candidate candidate_output = candidate.decode_forward(hidden, candidate_key, candidate_value, current_pos=7) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1733: in decode_forward return self._decode_forward_device_position( models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1679: in _decode_forward_device_position hidden_states = self._mlp_decode_flat(hidden_states) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/multichip_decoder.py:1468: in _mlp_decode_flat return self._all_reduce_flat(super()._mlp_decode(hidden_states), memory_config=self.residual_mem_config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ models/autoports/meta_llama_llama_3_1_70b_instruct/tt/optimized_decoder.py:865: in _mlp_decode down = ttnn.linear( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = FastOperation(python_fully_qualified_name='ttnn.linear', function=<ttnn._ttnn.operations.matmul.linear_t object at 0x7c4f6e373790>, preprocess_golden_function_inputs=<function default_preprocess_golden_function_inputs at 0x7c4f6dd1fb00>, golden_function=<function _golden_function at 0x7c4f6dd8c040>, postprocess_golden_function_outputs=<function default_postprocess_golden_function_outputs at 0x7c4f6dd1fba0>, is_cpp_operation=True, is_experimental=False) function_args = (device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[-2.8931e-02, 4.2725e-03, ..., 3.0640e-02, 1.8158e-03]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 7168]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 2, MeshCoordinate([0, 1]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 7.8735e-03, 3.3951e-04, ..., 1.0071e-02, 4.2114e-03]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 7168]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 1, MeshCoordinate([0, 2]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 1.7456e-02, -2.3460e-04, ..., -7.6599e-03, 1.1963e-02]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 7168]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 0, MeshCoordinate([0, 3]) ttnn.Tensor([[[[ 6.4392e-03, -9.1171e-04, ..., -1.3504e-03, 3.8910e-03]]]], shape=Shape([1, 1, 1, 7168]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT16, layout=Layout::TILE), device_id: 3, MeshCoordinate([0, 0]) ttnn.Tensor([[-0.0039, -0.0156, ..., 0.0117, 0.0078], [-0.0117, 0.0039, ..., -0.0195, 0.0000], ..., [ 0.0039, 0.0078, ..., 0.0098, -0.0039], [ 0.0117, 0.0078, ..., 0.0039, -0.0195]], shape=Shape([7168, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 2, MeshCoordinate([0, 1]) ttnn.Tensor([[ 0.0000e+00, -1.5625e-02, ..., -1.1719e-02, 3.9062e-03], [ 2.3438e-02, 7.8125e-03, ..., -3.9062e-03, 7.8125e-03], ..., [ 7.8125e-03, -1.5625e-02, ..., -7.8125e-03, 7.8125e-03], [-7.8125e-03, 0.0000e+00, ..., 1.9531e-02, 1.1719e-02]], shape=Shape([7168, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE) device_id: 1, MeshCoordinate([0, 2]) ttnn.Tensor([[-0.0039, 0.0273, ..., -0.0117, 0.0117], [ 0.0000, -0.0156, ..., -0.0039, -0.0078], ..., [-0.0039, 0.0000, ..., -0.0078, -0.0059], [-0.0273, 0.0000, ..., 0.0000, [-3.9062e-03, 3.9062e-03, ..., 0.0000e+00, -2.3438e-02], ..., [ 3.9062e-03, 3.9062e-03, ..., -3.9062e-03, 3.9062e-03], [ 7.8125e-03, 3.9062e-03, ..., 1.5625e-02, 0.0000e+00]], shape=Shape([7168, 8192]), dtype=DataType::BFLOAT4_B, layout=Layout::TILE)) function_kwargs = {'compute_kernel_config': <ttnn._ttnn.operations.core.WormholeComputeKernelConfig object at 0x7c4f6769c9c0>, 'dtype': DataType.BFLOAT16, 'memory_config': MemoryConfig(memory_layout=TensorMemoryLayout::WIDTH_SHARDED,buffer_type=BufferType::L1,shard_spec=std::nullopt,nd_shard_spec=std::nullopt,created_with_nd_shard_spec=0), 'program_config': MatmulMultiCoreReuseMultiCastDRAMShardedProgramConfig(in0_block_w=28,per_core_M=1,per_core_N=4,fused_activation=std::nullopt)} cq_id = None, recording = False
def __call__(self, *function_args, **function_kwargs): cq_id = None if "queue_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("queue_id") elif "cq_id" in function_kwargs: cq_id = function_kwargs.pop("cq_id")
recording = ttnn.graph.is_python_io_recording_enabled() if recording: ttnn.graph.track_function_start(self.python_fully_qualified_name) ttnn.graph.record_python_operation(self.python_fully_qualified_name, function_args, function_kwargs) input_tensors = get_all_tensors((function_args, function_kwargs)) set_tensor_id(input_tensors)
try: if cq_id is None: > result = self.function(*function_args, **function_kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E RuntimeError: TT_THROW @
